mapper.sql: id, store_id, user_id, product_id, attr_id, price, deposit, balance, num, sNo, is_deposit, is_balance, is_delete, add_time
mapper.select:
SELECT a.`id`, a.`store_id`, a.`user_id`, a.`product_id`, a.`attr_id`, a.`price`, a.`deposit`, a.`balance`, a.`num`, a.`sNo`, a.`pay_type`, a.`is_pay`, a.`is_refund`, a.`is_delete`, a.`add_time`, a.`pay_balance_time`, a.`order_info`, a.`order_details_info`, a.`real_sno`, a.`pay`, a.`paypal_id`, a.`stripe_id`, a.realPrice, a.attribute, a.user_name, a.headimgurl, a.`status`, a.order_add_time, a.sell_type, a.product_title, a.one_price, a.img, a.one_num, a.mobile, a.sheng, a.shi, a.xian, a.address, a.z_price, a.express_id, a.freight, a.courier_num, a.mchId, a.mchName, a.detailId FROM ( SELECT a.*, sum( a.price ) over(partition by a.sNo) realPrice, e.attribute, b.user_name, b.headimgurl, c.`status`, c.add_time order_add_time, f.sell_type, f.product_title, e.price one_price, e.img, e.num one_num, b.mobile, c.sheng, c.shi, c.xian, c.address, c.z_price, d.express_id, d.freight, d.courier_num, m.id mchId, m.name mchName, d.id AS detailId, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by a.sNo) AS top FROM lkt_pre_sell_record a LEFT JOIN lkt_user b ON a.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN lkt_order c ON a.sNo = c.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON a.sNo = d.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_configure e ON a.attr_id = e.id LEFT JOIN lkt_pre_sell_goods f ON a.product_id = f.product_id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list p ON a.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch m ON p.mch_id = m.id
ORDER BY c.add_time DESC )AS a WHERE a.top <2 LIMIT #{page},#{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(distinct a.sNo) FROM lkt_order c LEFT JOIN lkt_pre_sell_record a ON a.sNo = c.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_user b ON a.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON a.sNo = d.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_configure e ON a.attr_id = e.id LEFT JOIN lkt_pre_sell_goods f ON a.product_id = f.product_id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list p ON a.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch m ON p.mch_id = m.id

SELECT DISTINCT o.*,p.balance_pay_time FROM lkt_order o LEFT JOIN lkt_pre_sell_record r ON o.sNo = r.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_pre_sell_goods p ON r.product_id = p.product_id
order by add_time desc
